name: Built-in Outlet
flavor: Just the wall socket. Not really a PSU — but we measure it like one so the engine can treat every room uniformly.
flavor_zh: 其实就是个墙上插座。算不上电源——但引擎把它当电源算账，方便统一处理。

name: Dumpster PSU
flavor: Pulled out of a dumpster behind a Best Buy. The fan rattles when it gets warm.
flavor_zh: 从百思买后门垃圾桶捡来的。一热风扇就咯噔咯噔响。

name: Generic 500W
flavor: Off-brand bronze rating. The label is half-Chinese, half-Czech.
flavor_zh: 杂牌铜牌认证。标签一半中文一半捷克语。

name: Seasonic 650W
flavor: The sweet spot — silver-rated, well-built, doesn't smell like burning when it idles.
flavor_zh: 性价比之选——银牌认证，做工扎实，待机的时候不冒烟。

name: Cooler Master 850W
flavor: Gold-rated workhorse. Powers your mid-game like a champ.
flavor_zh: 金牌主力——撑起整个中期。

name: Corsair 1200W
flavor: Big rig PSU. Each cable is thicker than your kitten's tail.
flavor_zh: 大型矿场专用，每根线都比小猫尾巴粗。

name: Server-grade 1600W
flavor: Pulled from a decommissioned datacenter. Still has the asset tag.
flavor_zh: 从退役机房拆下来的，资产标签都没撕。

name: MEOWCore PSU
flavor: Self-engineered. Purrs when it works, screams when it doesn't.
flavor_zh: 自研款。工作时呼噜，故障时嚎叫。
